description: A circular-format still life painting showing a bouquet of roses in a glass vase at the center of a dark table. The roses are rendered in pinks, reds, whites, and soft yellows, their petals loosely brushed with thick, visible strokes. To the left of the vase stands a tall yellow ceramic pitcher. In the foreground, two wine glasses filled with red liquid catch the light, one at left and one at right. Behind the vase, a clear glass bottle is partially visible. The background is a warm, mottled brown, and the overall palette is rich and saturated with warm earth tones and vivid floral colors.
